name: Tunomon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Shoots slightly acidic bubbles from its mouth.

description: A tiny Digimon that hardened one of the feelers it had on its head as Punimon . It has evolved in a more animal-like direction from Punimon, and is covered in tufty body hair. It is still at the peak of playfulness, and it has a prank-loving personality, but its combat instinct has not awakened.
